scripts.package:android: pnpm exec cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease
scripts.package:ios:unsigned: pnpm exec cap sync ios && xcodebuild -workspace ios/App/App.xcworkspace -scheme App -configuration Release -sdk iphoneos archive -archivePath ios/build/App.xcarchive CODE_SIGN_IDENTITY="" CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO CODE_SIGNING_REQUIRED=NO DEVELOPMENT_TEAM="" && mkdir -p ios/build/unsigned_ipa/Payload && cp -R ios/build/App.xcarchive/Products/Applications/App.app ios/build/unsigned_ipa/Payload/ && cd ios/build/unsigned_ipa && zip -r ../App-unsigned.ipa Payload
